channel.title: LLM on Sharad Raj
channel.description: Recent content in LLM on Sharad Raj

item.title: Agentic RAG Workflows: Building Tool-Using Agents
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has become a cornerstone of modern AI systems, enabling language models to access external knowledge bases and provide more accurate, contextual responses. However, static RAG systems have limitations when dealing with complex queries that require multiple steps or tool interactions.

item.title: MLOps for LLM Services: CI/CD and Deployment Patterns
item.description:
Deploying large language models in production requires more than just containerization. It demands a comprehensive MLOps strategy that addresses model versioning, performance monitoring, and continuous improvement.

The MLOps Pipeline

A robust MLOps pipeline for LLM services includes:
